title: Everything is Totems and Edible MOD
description: You can eat every item in Minecraft or turn it into something like a totem.
body:
# Eat every item in Minecraft or turn it into something like a totem.

**With this mod you can eat any item or change any item to function like a totem, there are 2 modes, namely Edible Mode and Totem Mode.**

-----

<center>

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/139d456727d79300f9034ec6315b087e95a64221.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22bc3b74a095f1860e0c826130a5b775016e49b3.png)
  
### Edible
  
![eat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/236a2b413b76f6695b8d456bd872fa10178a951d.gif)

### Totem

![totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82dd71152262b46c9addf285bc4919c7d24a106e.gif)

### Toggle

![toggle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4463c9295e11ae669b30ba69220440ea9ddab95.gif)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22bc3b74a095f1860e0c826130a5b775016e49b3.png)

### Keybind

You can change the mode to edible or totem mode by pressing the toggle that can be set. You can also set it to normal mode (Vanilla Minecraft).

![keybind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/261dc783dd373210aa863ae327ebccebd52083c2.jpeg)

</center>
